endpoints.name: View all contacts under your account
endpoints.description: Shows all contacts under the client account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: View all your records for a given domain
endpoints.description: Shows all your records for a specific domain. You can try example.com below.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{DOMAIN}} with a real domain.

endpoints.name: Add dns record for given domain
endpoints.description: You can try example.com below. Types allowed are: A CNAME NS TXT MX SRV SPF
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{DOMAIN}} with a real domain.

endpoints.name: Delete dns record for a given domain
endpoints.description: Shows all your records for a specific domain. You can try example.com below.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{DOMAIN}} with a real domain.

endpoints.name: Update dns record for a given domain
endpoints.description: You can try example.com below.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{DOMAIN}} with a real domain.

endpoints.name: View all your domains managed by SolarVPS Distributed DNS
endpoints.description: Shows all your domains
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add domain to be managed by SolarVPS Distributed DNS
endpoints.description: Adds domain to SolarVPS Distributed DNS
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete domain from SolarVPS Distributed DNS
endpoints.description: Deletes domain from SolarVPS Distributed DNS
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Generate API Key
endpoints.description: API Key is regenerated if it already exists
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get API Key
endpoints.description: Gets the API Key for user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: View all your pods
endpoints.description: Shows all your pods
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: View information on a specific pod
endpoints.description: Shows details of a specific pod. Enter 1 below to see an example
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{PODID}} with a real podid.

endpoints.name: Ping your specified pod
endpoints.description: Returns the ping response from your server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{PODID}} with a real podid.

endpoints.name: Perform action on a specific pod
endpoints.description: Allowed actions are reboot, shutdown, boot
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{ACTION}} with a real action. Replace {{PODID}} with a real podid.

endpoints.name: View all your monitors
endpoints.description: Shows all your monitors
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: View all your critical notifications
endpoints.description: Shows all your critical notifications
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: View all your tickets
endpoints.description: Shows all your tickets
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Open ticket with desired department
endpoints.description: Available departments are support, billing, sales
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{DEPARTMENT}} with a real department.

endpoints.name: View details on a specific ticket
endpoints.description: Shows all information of a specific ticketId
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{TICKETID}} with a real ticketid.

endpoints.name: Post a reply to a ticket
endpoints.description: Post a reply to a ticket
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SOLARVPS_API_KEY}} with your SOLARVPS API KEY. Replace {{TICKETID}} with a real ticketid.
